faqs.question: What search parameters are covered in the GCC Local SEO Checklist?

faqs.question: What checks are critical before pushing a site live?
faqs.answer: Key items include checking image dimensions to prevent Cumulative Layout Shifts, validating robots.txt files, testing contact form endpoints, and checking analytics tags.
